issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling for missing files, permission errors, or other edge cases, making the skill less robust.

scenarios.name: Podcast batch processing: denoise, compress, normalize, fade
scenarios.rationale: Baseline applies a partial effects chain in a loop but skips the documented two-step noiseprof/noisered workflow and uses bare `norm`; the treatment runs `sox in -n noiseprof noise.prof trim 0 0.5` then chains `highpass 80 noisered noise.prof 0.2 compand 0.3,1 6:-70,-60,-20 -5 -90 0.2 norm -1 fade t 1 0 2` in a single sox invocation per file.

scenarios.name: Whisper prep: resample to 16kHz mono with leading/trailing silence trim
scenarios.rationale: Baseline correctly uses `-r 16000 -c 1` but misses silence trimming or reaches for ffmpeg; the treatment chains `silence 1 0.1 0.1% reverse silence 1 0.1 0.1% reverse` in the same sox command to trim both ends, then verifies with soxi.
